title: Connor McGregor
html:
Stub. UFC fighter whose quote "if you can see, and you have the courage to speak it, then it will happen" has become Yahir's recurring manifesto operating credo. Cited verbatim in 2025 10 03 im moving to austin, 2026 01 29 letter to emily, and the 2025 11 28 are we fucked how are we going to make it doc. Functions as one of Yahir's mentors-from-afar.

First mentioned in 2025 10 03 im moving to austin (corpus-wide); promoted to entity on 4th cross-summary mention.
